title: gesneria ferruginea
intro: Gesneria ferruginea, also known as the rusty gesneria or rusty flowering gesneria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Gesneria ferruginea include its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and anti-cancer agent. Herbal preparations of Gesneria ferruginea can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by mixing the plant material with other herbs to create a medicinal syrup.
